title: みんなの心のセンターは☆

text_block_list.text: Smart Falcon has truly become the top Umadol. Her popularity is extraordinary.

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan A
text_block_list.text: Are you dumb?! Bubblegum pop obviously suits Falco the best!

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan B
text_block_list.text:
No you idiot, Falco's pure and noble spirit is her
defining trait. It's all about bold songs that
express both her beauty and strength!

It appears her increasing number of passionate
fans don't always agree with each other...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey now! Don't fight over me!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Falco?!
Smart Falcon?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You know, I'm super happy that you're thinking of
me so much.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But everyone has their own ideas about what an
Umadol is, and everyone is free to support me
however they like!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: But this fool just doesn't get you... No, you don't get her!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...I get it. There are some things you just can't
budge on, right?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But if you feel like that, shoot those feelings my
way!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?
The next day...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Here I go! ☆

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Whaaaat?!

A crowd of fans, including the ones who were
arguing, gathers on campus after we hurriedly get
permission from the academy.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: I heard there was an event, but... it's just running?

text_block_list.name: Fan D
text_block_list.text: Is she not singing? I wanted to see her sing.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Okay, okay! Quiet, pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Attention, everyooone! ☆ I'm gonna run now, so
you'd better not blink or you'll miss it!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Readyyyyy... GO! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yaaahhh! ☆

And so, Smart Falcon sets off running along the
track by herself. Initially, the fans are confused,
but...
Before long, something strange starts to happen.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Huh? I... I can hear something... A song!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
It's... "UNLIMITED IMPACT"?! I can feel the
beauty and strength of an undisputed champion!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Not only that! It's innocent joy mixed with bubbly
cuteness... I can hear "Make Debut!" with my
heart!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Is there anything she can't do?!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo!
You're the best, Falco!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thanks for your support, everyone! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Falco!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! ☆ It looks like my feelings reached you
all!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Now I'm standing center stage in each and every
one of your hearts.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There's a Falco inside you, and a Falco inside
you... and all of those Falcos are different
because they're yours!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And don't worry! I won't betray any of them.
Why? Because I'm the top Umadol! ☆

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Falco!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
All right then! Let's try a little call and
response! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Wooooo-hoo! L-O-V-E! We love Falcooo!

In a single run, Smart Falcon manages to unite the
hearts of her fans. She truly embodies the
concept of a top Umadol.
